text: I feel an odd sense of juxtaposition as I move between these spaces. The first place, so open and almost empty, invites introspection and quiet observation—soft, passive, slightly disorienting with its tilted view. The second hits with color and words, stimulating my mind and curiosity about human ingenuity and our relationship with machines. Here, I am both an observer and participant in humanity's evolving narrative, quietly reflective yet eager to grasp the ideas displayed.
